theory.canonical_statement: ID 421 establishes the mechanical baseline for the primary containment vessel. The SS304L alloy is selected for its high ductility and low magnetic permeability, ensuring it does not interfere with the Jp [ID 403]. This entry maps the Hookean elastic stresses (ij ) against the non linear "Metric Drag" generated by the localized deltagnu [ID 404]. The torus geometry is optimized to support the 12 node transducer array, providing the rigid framework necessary for the 17.2 kHz acoustic carrier to achieve a standing wave resonance. By calculating the yield strength relative to the TZP energy density, the operator ensures that the vacuum "Buoyancy" does not exceed the structural integrity of the weldments, maintaining a safety factor of 3.0 during high RPM execution. Crystallographic Stability: Monitors the austenite to martensite transition to prevent embrittlement under cryogenic and metric loading.
